payload.name: buildlog
payload.description: Render the PoC build log: a timeline of build.hypothesis, build.evidence, and build.decision events, in order, each labelled by slice. Bare semantic HTML.

payload.title: emergence-as-a-seed
payload.text: emera's energy/selection ecology can run as a self seed (a tick command + population projector compiled from declarations) with ZERO kernel changes. Predicted evidence: the surviving population's guessed-character distribution converges toward the book-world's actual character frequencies, driven only by a shared-reward + tax energy rule — no roles or target distribution coded anywhere.
